description: Plugin-distributed hooks for developer-relations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 3 mechanically-detectable DevRel anti-patterns — (1) a vanity-metric headline (stars/followers/registered) with no activation/time-to-first-success metric, (2) marketing-speak aimed at developers (revolutionary/best-in-class/synergy/game-changer), (3) a placeholder secret or TODO in a code sample. Set DEVREL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
